mapper.select: SELECT inquiry_no AS inquiryNo, inquiry_type AS inquiryType, title, content, answer_content AS answerContent, status, DATE_FORMAT(reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS regDate, DATE_FORMAT(answer_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS answerDate FROM Inquiry WHERE inquiry_no = #{inquiryNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE Inquiry SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE inquiry_no = #{inquiryNo}
